questions.question: Describe the key differences between the waterfall and Agile software development methodologies. (6 marks)
questions.hint: Outline the key characteristics of each methodology

questions.question: What is the main purpose of a project initiation stage in the waterfall model? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of project initiation in the waterfall model

questions.question: How does the Agile methodology approach software development, and what are its key benefits? (8 marks)
questions.hint: Outline the key aspects of Agile software development and its advantages
